name: Obsidian MCP Server Enhanced
what_it_does: Enhanced MCP server for Obsidian vault interaction via the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Extends standard Obsidian MCP with additional capabilities: reading, creating, updating notes; managing frontmatter/properties; searching vault content; handling attachments; and managing daily notes. Provides comprehensive AI agent access to Obsidian knowledge bases.
use_cases: Reading, creating, and updating Obsidian notes from AI writing and research agents
Managing Obsidian vault frontmatter and properties for metadata automation
Searching and navigating Obsidian knowledge bases from AI-assisted workflows
Automating daily note creation and knowledge capture via AI agents
not_for: Users without Obsidian Local REST API plugin installed
Shared team wikis (Obsidian is primarily personal PKM)
best_when: An Obsidian user with the Local REST API plugin installed wants comprehensive AI agent access to their vault — reading, writing, searching, and managing notes and metadata.
avoid_when: You don't use Obsidian. Also: requires Local REST API plugin setup — adds complexity vs basic file access.

auth.notes: Obsidian Local REST API plugin API key required. Obsidian must be running with the plugin active.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Obsidian personal use is free; Local REST API plugin is free
pricing.paid_tiers: Obsidian Sync for vault sync ($10/month) — optional
pricing.notes: All components free for personal use. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — local Obsidian REST API

known_agent_gotchas: Requires Obsidian running with Local REST API plugin active — not background service
API key from Obsidian Local REST API plugin settings — different from other Obsidian plugins
Enhanced version adds capabilities beyond stock Obsidian MCP — verify feature availability
Vault path structure matters — use correct note paths relative to vault root
agent_readiness.security_notes: Personal notes may be sensitive. API key required. Local REST API exposed on localhost — not remotely accessible by default.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local REST API with API key. Personal vault data. Localhost-only by default — safe from remote access.
